failures.description: The agent incorrectly filtered the ProductCatalogSearch results and omitted item_id 5312063289 even though its price was $195.15, which is greater than $194.56.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user goal was to list available Skateboard items with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The tool output at index 3 contained all required evidence. Four items satisfy the threshold: 4293355847 ($200.80), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.60). At index 4, the Executor synthesized an answer from that tool output but omitted item_id 5312063289, which is clearly above $194.56. This is a reasoning/filtering error over the tool output, not an invalid tool call or unsupported intent.
